- Deck builder page matches `storefront-deck-builder.html` wireframe: polished header toolbar, styled card browser panel, styled deck surface with zone headers, mobile bottom sheet visual alignment

  <style>
    /* =============================================
       VOLTAGE DESIGN TOKENS (dark mode only)
       ============================================= */
    :root {
      --brand-primary: #8B5CF6;
      --brand-secondary: #FF7849;
      --brand-primary-subtle: #1E1A3A;
      --brand-secondary-subtle: #2A1A12;

      --bg-base: #09090F;
      --bg-surface-1: #18162A;
      --bg-surface-2: #21203A;
      --bg-surface-3: #2C2A4A;
      --bg-surface-4: #38365C;

      --text-primary: #F0EEFF;
      --text-secondary: #B8B0D8;
      --text-tertiary: #7B72A8;

      --border-default: #2C2A4A;
      --border-strong: #4A4680;

      --positive: #10B981;
      --negative: #EF4444;
      --warning: #F59E0B;
      --info: #3B82F6;
      --interactive: #8B5CF6;

      --game-mtg: #A78BFA;
      --game-pokemon: #FCD34D;
      --game-ygo: #60A5FA;
      --game-op: #34D399;

      --font-display: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
      --font-heading: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
      --font-body: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      --font-mono: 'DM Mono', monospace;

      --radius-sm: 6px;
      --radius-md: 10px;
      --radius-lg: 14px;
      --radius-xl: 20px;

      --mana-red: #EF4444;
    }

    /* =============================================
       GLOBAL RESET + CANVAS
       ============================================= */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body {
      background: #060610;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      line-height: 1.5;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
    }

    /* =============================================
       WIREFRAME CANVAS — side-by-side frames
       ============================================= */
    .canvas {
      display: flex;
      gap: 80px;
      padding: 60px;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: center;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }
    .frame-wrapper {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .frame-label {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      padding: 6px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }

    /* Desktop frame */
    .desktop-frame {
      width: 1440px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-radius: 16px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      box-shadow: 0 0 80px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.06);
    }

    /* Mobile frame */
    .mobile-frame {
      width: 390px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-radius: 40px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 3px solid var(--bg-surface-3);
      box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.06);
      position: relative;
    }
    .mobile-frame::before {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 120px;
      height: 28px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      border-radius: 0 0 14px 14px;
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      z-index: 10;
    }

    /* =============================================
       HERO HEADER
       ============================================= */
    .deck-hero {
      position: relative;
      padding: 48px;
      min-height: 320px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 48px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .deck-hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.12) 0%, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.04) 40%, transparent 70%),
                  linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 60%, var(--bg-base) 100%);
      z-index: 0;
    }
    .deck-hero::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: -80px;
      right: -80px;
      width: 400px;
      height: 400px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
      z-index: 0;
    }
    .hero-left, .hero-right {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
    }
    .hero-left {
      flex: 1;
      max-width: 780px;
    }
    .hero-right {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: flex-end;
      gap: 16px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* Badges */
    .badge-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .game-badge {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 5px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.15);
      color: var(--game-mtg);
      border: 1px solid rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.3);
    }
    .format-badge {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 5px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
      background: transparent;
    }

    /* Deck name */
    .deck-name {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 44px;
      line-height: 1.1;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    }

    /* Author row */
    .author-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .author-avatar {
      width: 32px;
      height: 32px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #EF4444, #F59E0B);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .author-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 15px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .verified-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .author-meta {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }

    /* Description */
    .deck-description {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 15px;
      line-height: 1.65;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      max-width: 640px;
    }

    /* Tag chips */
    .tag-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;

    .tag-chip {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 12px;
      padding: 4px 12px;

    /* Social stats */
    .social-stats {

    }

      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .social-stat .stat-icon {
      font-size: 16px;
    }
    .social-stat .stat-num {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 13px;
    }
    .share-btn {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 13px;
      padding: 6px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    /* Action buttons */
    .hero-actions {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
      width: 240px;
    }
    .btn-primary {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 15px;
      padding: 12px 24px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .btn-violet {
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
    }
    .btn-coral {
      background: var(--brand-secondary);
      color: white;
    }
    .btn-ghost {
      background: transparent;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
      font-size: 13px;
      padding: 10px 24px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       STICKY TAB NAVIGATION
       ============================================= */
    .tab-nav {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0;
      padding: 0 48px;
      height: 52px;
      background: rgba(9, 9, 15, 0.8);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      position: relative;
      z-index: 15;
    }
    .tab-item {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 14px;
      padding: 0 24px;
      height: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      position: relative;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .tab-item.active {
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .tab-item.active::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 24px;
      right: 24px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      border-radius: 2px 2px 0 0;
    }

    /* =============================================
       SECTION HEADERS
       ============================================= */
    .section-header {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 28px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    }
    .section-divider {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
      margin: 40px 0 24px 0;
    }
    .section-divider::after {
      content: '';

      background: var(--border-default);
    }
    .section-divider-label {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 11px;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      padding: 4px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       VISUAL VIEW — CARD GRID
       ============================================= */
    .visual-view {
      padding: 32px 48px 48px;
    }
    .card-type-group {
      margin-bottom: 32px;
    }
    .card-type-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      padding-bottom: 10px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .card-type-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 16px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .card-type-count {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      padding: 2px 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
    }
    .card-grid {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .card-tile {
      position: relative;
      width: 180px;
    }
    .card-image {
      width: 180px;
      height: 252px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .card-image-inner {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 12px;
      line-height: 1.3;
    }
    /* Color-coded card backgrounds by type */
    .card-creature { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #2D1A1A 0%, #1A1020 100%); }
    .card-instant { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1A1A2D 0%, #1A1020 100%); }
    .card-sorcery { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #2D1A2D 0%, #1A1020 100%); }
    .card-land { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1A2D1A 0%, #1A1020 100%); }
    .card-sideboard { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1A1A1A 0%, #141020 100%); }
    .qty-badge {
      position: absolute;
      top: 8px;
      right: 8px;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 11px;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
      z-index: 2;
    }
    .card-name-label {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-top: 6px;
      text-align: center;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }

    /* Annotation for hover */
    .hover-annotation {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-top: 4px;
      text-align: center;
      opacity: 0.6;
    }

    /* Sideboard collapsible */
    .sideboard-toggle {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;

      margin-bottom: 16px;

    }
    .sideboard-chevron {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      transition: transform 0.2s;
    }

    /* =============================================
       LIST VIEW
       ============================================= */
    .list-view {
      padding: 32px 48px 48px;
    }
    .list-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
    }
    .list-table th {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);

       STATS PANEL
       ============================================= */

      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .meta-chip.legal {
      border-color: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);
      color: var(--positive);
      background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.08);
    }
    .meta-chip.tier {
      border-color: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.3);
      color: var(--warning);
      background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.08);
    }

    /* =============================================
       PRICING TAB
       ============================================= */
    .pricing-view {
      padding: 32px 48px 48px;
    }
    .pricing-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      padding: 24px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .pricing-total-label {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .pricing-total-amount {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 36px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .pricing-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
    }
    .pricing-table th {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 11px;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      padding: 10px 16px;
      text-align: left;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
    }
    .pricing-table th:nth-child(3),
    .pricing-table th:nth-child(4) {
      text-align: right;
    }
    .pricing-table td {
      font-size: 14px;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .pricing-table td:nth-child(3),
    .pricing-table td:nth-child(4) {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      text-align: right;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .pricing-table tr.highlight td {
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.05);
    }
    .pricing-table .qty-cell {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }

    /* Seller comparison */
    .seller-comparison {
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 24px;
    }
    .seller-comparison-title {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 13px;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .seller-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 12px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .seller-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .seller-name {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .seller-price {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 14px;
    }
    .seller-price.best {
      color: var(--positive);
    }
    .seller-badge {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1);
      color: var(--positive);
      margin-left: 8px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       COMMENTS
       ============================================= */
    .comments-section {
      padding: 32px 48px 48px;
    }
    .comments-header {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 18px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .comments-header span {
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      font-weight: 400;
    }
    .comment-input-area {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
      padding: 16px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .comment-input-avatar {
      width: 36px;
      height: 36px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand-primary), var(--brand-secondary));
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .comment-input-right {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .comment-textarea {
      width: 100%;
      height: 48px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      padding: 12px 16px;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      resize: none;
    }
    .comment-input-actions {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: flex-end;
    }
    .comment-post-btn {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 13px;
      padding: 8px 20px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .comment-thread {
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .comment {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 16px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .comment:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .comment-avatar {
      width: 36px;
      height: 36px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .comment-body {
      flex: 1;
    }
    .comment-meta {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .comment-author {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .comment-author-badge {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15);
      color: var(--brand-primary);
    }
    .comment-time {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .comment-text {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.6;
    }
    .comment-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 16px;
      margin-top: 8px;
    }
    .comment-action {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .comment-reply {
      margin-left: 48px;
      border-left: 2px solid var(--border-default);
      padding-left: 16px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       DEVELOPER ANNOTATIONS
       ============================================= */
    .dev-annotation {
      margin: 48px;
      padding: 24px;
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.04);
      border: 1px dashed var(--border-strong);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    }
    .dev-annotation-title {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .dev-annotation-content {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .dev-annotation-content code {
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      padding: 2px 6px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }

    /* =============================================
       MOBILE-SPECIFIC STYLES
       ============================================= */
    .m-hero {
      padding: 24px 20px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .m-hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
                  linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 50%, var(--bg-base) 100%);
      z-index: 0;
    }
    .m-hero > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
    .m-deck-name {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 32px;
      line-height: 1.1;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .m-author-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .m-description {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.6;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .m-social-inline {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .m-social-item {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
    }
    .m-btn-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .m-btn {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 14px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    /* Mobile tabs */
    .m-tabs {
      display: flex;
      overflow-x: auto;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
      scrollbar-width: none;
      gap: 0;
      padding: 0 20px;
      height: 44px;
      background: rgba(9, 9, 15, 0.85);
      backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .m-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
    .m-tab {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 13px;
      padding: 0 16px;
      height: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      white-space: nowrap;
      position: relative;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .m-tab.active {
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .m-tab.active::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 16px;
      right: 16px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      border-radius: 2px 2px 0 0;
    }

    /* Mobile card grid */
    .m-visual-view {
      padding: 20px;
    }
    .m-card-type-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      padding-bottom: 8px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .m-card-type-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .m-card-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .m-card-tile {
      position: relative;
    }
    .m-card-image {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 5/7;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    }
    .m-card-image-inner {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 8px;
      line-height: 1.3;
    }
    .m-qty-badge {
      position: absolute;
      top: 6px;
      right: 6px;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 10px;
      padding: 1px 7px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
      z-index: 2;
    }
    .m-card-name-label {
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-top: 4px;
      text-align: center;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }

    /* Mobile stats */
    .m-stats {
      padding: 20px;
    }
    .m-stat-card {
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    /* Mobile bottom bar */
    .m-bottom-bar {
      padding: 12px 20px;
      padding-bottom: 28px;
      background: rgba(9, 9, 15, 0.9);
      backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .m-bottom-btn {
      width: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 15px;
      padding: 14px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      background: var(--brand-secondary);
      color: white;
      border: none;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- =============================================
     WIREFRAME CANVAS
     ============================================= -->
<div class="canvas">

  <!-- ==========================================
       DESKTOP — 1440px
       ========================================== -->
  <div class="frame-wrapper">
    <div class="frame-label">Desktop — 1440px × auto — <DeckDetailPage></div>
    <div class="desktop-frame">

      <div id="sd-nav-root"></div>
      <script src="sd-nav.js"></script>
      <script>SdNav.init({});</script>

      <!-- ==========================================

           ========================================== -->
      <div class="deck-hero" data-component="DeckHero">

            A blazing-fast aggro deck that aims to deal 20 damage by turn 4. Leverages efficient burn spells and hasty creatures to close out games before opponents can stabilize.

            <div class="social-stat">
              <span class="stat-icon">◉</span>
              <span class="stat-num">1.2k</span>
              <span>views</span>
            </div>
            <div class="share-btn">
              <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M4 12v8a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2v-8"/><polyline points="16,6 12,2 8,6"/><line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
              Share

          </div>
          <div class="hero-actions">
            <button class="btn-primary btn-violet">
              <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 01-2-2V4a2 2 0 012-2h9a2 2 0 012 2v1"/></svg>
              Copy Deck
            </button>
            <button class="btn-primary btn-coral">
              <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 002 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 002-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg>
              Buy All Cards — $127.45
            </button>
            <button class="btn-primary btn-ghost">
              <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7,10 12,15 17,10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
              Export
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ==========================================
           SECTION 2: STICKY TAB NAVIGATION
           ========================================== -->
      <div class="tab-nav">
        <div class="tab-item active">Visual</div>
        <div class="tab-item">List</div>
        <div class="tab-item">Stats</div>
        <div class="tab-item">Pricing</div>
        <div class="tab-item">Comments</div>
      </div>

      <!-- ==========================================
           SECTION 3: VISUAL VIEW (default)
           ========================================== -->
      <div class="visual-view" data-component="DeckVisualView">

        <!-- Creatures (12) -->
        <div class="card-type-group">
          <div class="card-type-header">
            <span class="card-type-name">Creatures</span>
            <span class="card-type-count">12</span>
          </div>
          <div class="card-grid">
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-creature">Monastery<br>Swiftspear</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Monastery Swiftspear</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-creature">Goblin<br>Guide</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Goblin Guide</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-creature">Eidolon of the<br>Great Revel</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Eidolon of the Great Revel</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="hover-annotation">hover: card enlarges to 280×392px with tooltip</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Instants (16) -->
        <div class="card-type-group">
          <div class="card-type-header">
            <span class="card-type-name">Instants</span>
            <span class="card-type-count">16</span>
          </div>
          <div class="card-grid">
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-instant">Lightning<br>Bolt</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Lightning Bolt</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-instant">Searing<br>Blaze</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Searing Blaze</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-instant">Skullcrack</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Skullcrack</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-instant">Lava<br>Spike</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Lava Spike</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Sorceries (12) -->
        <div class="card-type-group">
          <div class="card-type-header">
            <span class="card-type-name">Sorceries</span>
            <span class="card-type-count">12</span>
          </div>
          <div class="card-grid">
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-sorcery">Rift<br>Bolt</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Rift Bolt</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-sorcery">Chain<br>Lightning</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Chain Lightning</div>

            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-sorcery">Light Up<br>the Stage</div></div>

          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Lands (18) -->
        <div class="card-type-group">
          <div class="card-type-header">
            <span class="card-type-name">Lands</span>
            <span class="card-type-count">18</span>
          </div>
          <div class="card-grid">
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×10</span><div class="card-image-inner card-land">Mountain</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Mountain</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×4</span><div class="card-image-inner card-land">Inspiring<br>Vantage</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Inspiring Vantage</div>

            <div class="card-tile">
              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×2</span><div class="card-image-inner card-land">Fiery<br>Islet</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Fiery Islet</div>

            <div class="card-tile">

        <div class="card-type-group">

            <span class="card-type-count">15</span>
          </div>
          <div class="card-grid">

              <div class="card-image"><span class="qty-badge">×3</span><div class="card-image-inner card-sideboard">Smash to<br>Smithereens</div></div>
              <div class="card-name-label">Smash to Smithereens</div>
            </div>

      <!-- ==========================================

          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr class="type-row"><td colspan="5">Creatures (12)</td></tr>

            <tr><td>4</td><td>Eidolon of the Great Revel</td><td class="mana-symbols">{R}{R}</td><td style="color:var(--text-tertiary);font-size:13px">Creature</td><td>$35.96</td></tr>

            <tr class="type-row"><td colspan="5">Instants (16)</td></tr>
            <tr><td>4</td><td>Lightning Bolt</td><td class="mana-symbols">{R}</td><td style="color:var(--text-tertiary);font-size:13px">Instant</td><td>$3.60</td></tr>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>SideDecked — Deck Viewer / Detail Wireframe (Voltage)</title>
  <script src="https://mcp.figma.com/mcp/html-to-design/capture.js" async></script>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@500;600;700;800&family=Barlow:wght@400;500;600&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    /* =============================================
       VOLTAGE DESIGN TOKENS (dark mode only)
       ============================================= */
    :root {
      --brand-primary: #8B5CF6;
      --brand-secondary: #FF7849;
      --brand-primary-subtle: #1E1A3A;
      --brand-secondary-subtle: #2A1A12;

      --bg-base: #09090F;
      --bg-surface-1: #18162A;
      --bg-surface-2: #21203A;
      --bg-surface-3: #2C2A4A;
      --bg-surface-4: #38365C;

      --text-primary: #F0EEFF;
      --text-secondary: #B8B0D8;
      --text-tertiary: #7B72A8;

      --border-default: #2C2A4A;
      --border-strong: #4A4680;

      --positive: #10B981;
      --negative: #EF4444;
      --warning: #F59E0B;
      --info: #3B82F6;
      --interactive: #8B5CF6;

      --game-mtg: #A78BFA;
      --game-pokemon: #FCD34D;
      --game-ygo: #60A5FA;
      --game-op: #34D399;

      --font-display: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
      --font-heading: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
      --font-body: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      --font-mono: 'DM Mono', monospace;

      --radius-sm: 6px;
      --radius-md: 10px;
      --radius-lg: 14px;
      --radius-xl: 20px;

      --mana-red: #EF4444;
    }

    /* =============================================
       GLOBAL RESET + CANVAS
       ============================================= */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body {
      background: #060610;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      line-height: 1.5;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
    }

    /* =============================================
       WIREFRAME CANVAS — side-by-side frames
       ============================================= */
    .canvas {
      display: flex;
      gap: 80px;
      padding: 60px;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: center;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }
    .frame-wrapper {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .frame-label {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      padding: 6px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }

    /* Desktop frame */
    .desktop-frame {
      width: 1440px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-radius: 16px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      box-shadow: 0 0 80px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.06);
    }

    /* Mobile frame */
    .mobile-frame {
      width: 390px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-radius: 40px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 3px solid var(--bg-surface-3);
      box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.06);
      position: relative;
    }
    .mobile-frame::before {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 120px;
      height: 28px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      border-radius: 0 0 14px 14px;
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      z-index: 10;
    }

    /* =============================================
       HERO HEADER
       ============================================= */
    .deck-hero {
      position: relative;
      padding: 48px;
      min-height: 320px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 48px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .deck-hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.12) 0%, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.04) 40%, transparent 70%),
                  linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 60%, var(--bg-base) 100%);
      z-index: 0;
    }
    .deck-hero::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: -80px;
      right: -80px;
      width: 400px;
      height: 400px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
      z-index: 0;
    }
    .hero-left, .hero-right {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
    }
    .hero-left {
      flex: 1;
      max-width: 780px;
    }
    .hero-right {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: flex-end;
      gap: 16px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* Badges */
    .badge-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .game-badge {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 5px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.15);
      color: var(--game-mtg);
      border: 1px solid rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.3);
    }
    .format-badge {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 5px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
      background: transparent;
    }

    /* Deck name */
    .deck-name {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 44px;
      line-height: 1.1;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    }

    /* Author row */
    .author-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .author-avatar {
      width: 32px;
      height: 32px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #EF4444, #F59E0B);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .author-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 15px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .verified-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .author-meta {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }

    /* Description */
    .deck-description {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 15px;
      line-height: 1.65;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      max-width: 640px;
    }

    /* Tag chips */
    .tag-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .tag-chip {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 12px;
      padding: 4px 12px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }

    /* Social stats */
    .social-stats {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .social-stat {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .social-stat .stat-icon {
      font-size: 16px;
    }
    .social-stat .stat-num {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 13px;
    }
    .share-btn {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 13px;
      padding: 6px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    /* Action buttons */
    .hero-actions {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
      width: 240px;
    }
    .btn-primary {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 15px;
      padding: 12px 24px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .btn-violet {
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
    }
    .btn-coral {
      background: var(--brand-secondary);
      color: white;
    }
    .btn-ghost {
      background: transparent;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
      font-size: 13px;
      padding: 10px 24px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       STICKY TAB NAVIGATION
       ============================================= */
    .tab-nav {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0;
      padding: 0 48px;
      height: 52px;
      background: rgba(9, 9, 15, 0.8);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      position: relative;
      z-index: 15;
    }
    .tab-item {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 14px;
      padding: 0 24px;
      height: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      position: relative;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .tab-item.active {
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .tab-item.active::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 24px;
      right: 24px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      border-radius: 2px 2px 0 0;
    }

    /* =============================================
       SECTION HEADERS
       ============================================= */
    .section-header {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 28px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    }
    .section-divider {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
      margin: 40px 0 24px 0;
    }
    .section-divider::after {
      content: '';
      flex: 1;
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--border-default);
    }
    .section-divider-label {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 11px;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      padding: 4px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       VISUAL VIEW — CARD GRID
       ============================================= */
    .visual-view {
      padding: 32px 48px 48px;
    }
    .card-type-group {
      margin-bottom: 32px;
    }
    .card-type-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      padding-bottom: 10px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .card-type-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 16px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .card-type-count {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      padding: 2px 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
    }
    .card-grid {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .card-tile {
      position: relative;
      width: 180px;
    }
    .card-image {
      width: 180px;
      height: 252px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .card-image-inner {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 12px;
      line-height: 1.3;
    }
    /* Color-coded card backgrounds by type */
    .card-creature { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #2D1A1A 0%, #1A1020 100%); }
    .card-instant { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1A1A2D 0%, #1A1020 100%); }
    .card-sorcery { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #2D1A2D 0%, #1A1020 100%); }
    .card-land { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1A2D1A 0%, #1A1020 100%); }
    .card-sideboard { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1A1A1A 0%, #141020 100%); }
    .qty-badge {
      position: absolute;
      top: 8px;
      right: 8px;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 11px;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
      z-index: 2;
    }
    .card-name-label {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-top: 6px;
      text-align: center;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }

    /* Annotation for hover */
    .hover-annotation {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-top: 4px;
      text-align: center;
      opacity: 0.6;
    }

    /* Sideboard collapsible */
    .sideboard-toggle {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      padding-bottom: 10px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .sideboard-chevron {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      transition: transform 0.2s;
    }

    /* =============================================
       LIST VIEW
       ============================================= */
    .list-view {
      padding: 32px 48px 48px;
    }
    .list-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
    }
    .list-table th {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 11px;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      padding: 10px 16px;
      text-align: left;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
    }
    .list-table th:last-child {
      text-align: right;
    }
    .list-table td {
      font-size: 14px;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .list-table td:first-child {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      width: 48px;
    }
    .list-table td:last-child {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      text-align: right;
    }
    .list-table .type-row td {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      padding: 8px 16px;
    }
    .list-table .mana-symbols {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .list-table .total-row td {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      border-top: 2px solid var(--brand-primary);
      border-bottom: none;
      padding: 14px 16px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       STATS PANEL
       ============================================= */
    .stats-panel {
      padding: 32px 48px 48px;
    }
    .stats-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 32px;
    }
    .stat-card {
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 24px;
    }
    .stat-card-title {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 13px;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    /* Mana Curve */
    .mana-curve {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-end;
      gap: 8px;
      height: 120px;
      padding-top: 8px;
    }
    .mana-bar-group {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      height: 100%;
      justify-content: flex-end;
    }
    .mana-bar {
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 36px;
      border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
      background: linear-gradient(to top, var(--brand-primary), rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.5));
      position: relative;
    }
    .mana-bar-count {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      text-align: center;
    }
    .mana-bar-label {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .avg-cmc {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-top: 12px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .avg-cmc strong {
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    /* Color distribution */
    .color-bar {
      height: 12px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .color-bar-segment {
      height: 100%;
    }
    .color-legend {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .color-legend-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .color-dot {
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }

    /* Type distribution */
    .type-dist-bar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .type-dist-label {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      width: 80px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .type-dist-track {
      flex: 1;
      height: 8px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      border-radius: 4px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .type-dist-fill {
      height: 100%;
      border-radius: 4px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
    }
    .type-dist-count {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      width: 28px;
      text-align: right;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* Win rate / tournament */
    .win-rate-display {
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .win-rate-number {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 56px;
      color: var(--positive);
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .win-rate-label {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-top: 4px;
    }
    .tournament-list {
      list-style: none;
    }
    .tournament-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      padding: 10px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .tournament-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .tournament-medal {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .medal-gold { background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.2); color: #F59E0B; }
    .medal-silver { background: rgba(156, 163, 175, 0.2); color: #9CA3AF; }

    .meta-chips {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      margin-top: 16px;
    }
    .meta-chip {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 12px;
      padding: 5px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .meta-chip.legal {
      border-color: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);
      color: var(--positive);
      background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.08);
    }
    .meta-chip.tier {
      border-color: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.3);
      color: var(--warning);
      background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.08);
    }

    /* =============================================
       PRICING TAB
       ============================================= */
    .pricing-view {
      padding: 32px 48px 48px;
    }
    .pricing-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      padding: 24px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .pricing-total-label {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .pricing-total-amount {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 36px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .pricing-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
    }
    .pricing-table th {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 11px;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      padding: 10px 16px;
      text-align: left;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
    }
    .pricing-table th:nth-child(3),
    .pricing-table th:nth-child(4) {
      text-align: right;
    }
    .pricing-table td {
      font-size: 14px;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .pricing-table td:nth-child(3),
    .pricing-table td:nth-child(4) {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      text-align: right;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .pricing-table tr.highlight td {
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.05);
    }
    .pricing-table .qty-cell {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }

    /* Seller comparison */
    .seller-comparison {
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 24px;
    }
    .seller-comparison-title {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 13px;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .seller-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 12px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .seller-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .seller-name {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .seller-price {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 14px;
    }
    .seller-price.best {
      color: var(--positive);
    }
    .seller-badge {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1);
      color: var(--positive);
      margin-left: 8px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       COMMENTS
       ============================================= */
    .comments-section {
      padding: 32px 48px 48px;
    }
    .comments-header {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 18px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .comments-header span {
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      font-weight: 400;
    }
    .comment-input-area {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
      padding: 16px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .comment-input-avatar {
      width: 36px;
      height: 36px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand-primary), var(--brand-secondary));
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .comment-input-right {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .comment-textarea {
      width: 100%;
      height: 48px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      padding: 12px 16px;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      resize: none;
    }
    .comment-input-actions {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: flex-end;
    }
    .comment-post-btn {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 13px;
      padding: 8px 20px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .comment-thread {
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .comment {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 16px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .comment:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .comment-avatar {
      width: 36px;
      height: 36px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .comment-body {
      flex: 1;
    }
    .comment-meta {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .comment-author {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .comment-author-badge {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15);
      color: var(--brand-primary);
    }
    .comment-time {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .comment-text {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.6;
    }
    .comment-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 16px;
      margin-top: 8px;
    }
    .comment-action {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .comment-reply {
      margin-left: 48px;
      border-left: 2px solid var(--border-default);
      padding-left: 16px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       DEVELOPER ANNOTATIONS
       ============================================= */
    .dev-annotation {
      margin: 48px;
      padding: 24px;
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.04);
      border: 1px dashed var(--border-strong);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    }
    .dev-annotation-title {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .dev-annotation-content {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .dev-annotation-content code {
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      padding: 2px 6px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }

    /* =============================================
       MOBILE-SPECIFIC STYLES
       ============================================= */
    .m-hero {
      padding: 24px 20px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .m-hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
                  linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 50%, var(--bg-base) 100%);
      z-index: 0;
    }
    .m-hero > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
    .m-deck-name {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 32px;
      line-height: 1.1;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .m-author-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .m-description {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.6;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .m-social-inline {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .m-social-item {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
    }
    .m-btn-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .m-btn {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 14px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    /* Mobile tabs */
    .m-tabs {
      display: flex;
      overflow-x: auto;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
      scrollbar-width: none;
      gap: 0;
      padding: 0 20px;
      height: 44px;
      background: rgba(9, 9, 15, 0.85);
      backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .m-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
    .m-tab {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 13px;
      padding: 0 16px;
      height: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      white-space: nowrap;
      position: relative;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .m-tab.active {
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .m-tab.active::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 16px;
      right: 16px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      border-radius: 2px 2px 0 0;
    }

    /* Mobile card grid */
    .m-visual-view {
      padding: 20px;
    }
    .m-card-type-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      padding-bottom: 8px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .m-card-type-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .m-card-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .m-card-tile {
      position: relative;
    }
    .m-card-image {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 5/7;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    }
    .m-card-image-inner {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 8px;
      line-height: 1.3;
    }
    .m-qty-badge {
      position: absolute;
      top: 6px;
      right: 6px;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 10px;
      padding: 1px 7px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
      z-index: 2;
    }
    .m-card-name-label {
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-top: 4px;
      text-align: center;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }

    /* Mobile stats */
    .m-stats {
      padding: 20px;
    }
    .m-stat-card {
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    /* Mobile bottom bar */
    .m-bottom-bar {
      padding: 12px 20px;
      padding-bottom: 28px;
      background: rgba(9, 9, 15, 0.9);
      backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .m-bottom-btn {
      width: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 15px;
      padding: 14px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      background: var(--brand-secondary);
      color: white;
      border: none;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- =============================================
     WIREFRAME CANVAS
     ============================================= -->
<div class="canvas">

  <!-- ==========================================
       DESKTOP — 1440px
       ========================================== -->
  <div class="frame-wrapper">
    <div class="frame-label">Desktop — 1440px × auto — <DeckDetailPage></div>
    <div class="desktop-frame">

      <div id="sd-nav-root"></div>
      <script src="sd-nav.js"></script>
      <script>SdNav.init({});</script>

      <!-- ==========================================
           SECTION 1: DECK HERO HEADER
           ========================================== -->
      <div class="deck-hero" data-component="DeckHero">
        <div class="hero-left">
          <div class="badge-row">
            <div class="game-badge">Magic: The Gathering</div>
            <div class="format-badge">Modern</div>
          </div>
          <h1 class="deck-name">Mono Red Burn</h1>
          <div class="author-row">
            <div class="author-avatar"></div>
            <span class="author-name">by @pyromancer99</span>
            <span class="verified-badge">✓</span>
            <span class="author-meta">· Updated 2 days ago</span>
          </div>
          <p class="deck-description">
            A blazing-fast aggro deck that aims to deal 20 damage by turn 4. Leverages efficient burn spells and hasty creatures to close out games before opponents can stabilize.
          </p>
          <div class="tag-row">
            <span class="tag-chip">Aggro</span>
            <span class="tag-chip">Burn</span>
            <span class="tag-chip">Budget-Friendly</span>
            <span class="tag-chip">Tournament Proven</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-right">
          <div class="social-stats">
            <div class="social-stat">
              <span class="stat-icon">♥</span>
              <span class="stat-num">342</span>
              <span>likes</span>
            </div>
            <div class="social-stat">
              <span class="stat-icon">⧉</span>
              <span class="stat-num">89</span>
              <span>copies</span>
            </div>
            <div class="social-stat">
              <span class="stat-icon">◉</span>
              <span class="stat-num">1.2k</span>
              <span>views</span>
            </div>
            <div class="share-btn">
              <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M4 12v8a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2v-8"/><polyline points="16,6 12,2 8,6"/><line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
              Share
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="hero-actions">
            <button class="btn-primary btn-violet">
              <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 01-2-2V4a2 2 0 012-2h9a2 2 0 012 2v1"/></svg>
              Copy Deck
            </button>
            <button class="btn-primary btn-coral">
              <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 002 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 002-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg>
              Buy All Cards — $127.45
            </button>
            <button class="btn-primary btn-ghost">
              <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7,10 12,15 17,10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
              Export
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ==========================================
           SECTION 2: STICKY TAB NAVIGATION
           ========================================== -->
      <div class="tab-nav">
        <div class="tab-item active">Visual</div>
        <div class="tab-item">List</div>
        <div class="tab-item">Stats</div>
        <div class="tab-item">Pricing</div>
        <div class="tab-item">Comments</div>
      </div>

      <!-- ==========================================
           SECTION 3: VISUAL VIEW (default)
           ========================================== -->
      <div class="visual-view" data-component="DeckVisualView">

        <!-- Creatures (12) -->
        <div class="card-type-group">
          <div class="card-type-header">
            <span class="card-type-name">Creatures</span>
            <span class="card-type-count">12</span>
          </div>
          <div class="card-grid">

I've been running a similar list but with 2x Shard Volley instead of Chain Lightning. Have you tested that swap? Chain Lightning feels slow in the mirror match when they can pay {R}{R} to copy it back.
♥ 12 Reply
@pyromancer99 Author 2 hours ago
Good point about the mirror! In my testing, Chain Lightning is better in ~80% of matchups because the copy clause rarely matters outside burn mirrors. Shard Volley's land sac cost is too steep when you're already on 18 lands.
♥ 8 Reply
@spikeTCG 1 day ago
Took this exact 75 to FNM last Friday and went 4-0. The sideboard Leyline of Punishment is incredible against the Lifegain decks running rampant in my meta. Only change I'd suggest is finding room for a 3rd Exquisite Firecraft for the control matchup.
♥ 24 Reply
@budgetbrewer 2 days ago
Love that this is labeled Budget-Friendly. Under $130 for a competitive Modern deck is a steal. For anyone building on a tighter budget, you can replace Goblin Guide with Kumano Faces Kakkazan and save ~$40 with only a small performance hit.
